diff: The current Turbo-Fill Floor for the Aggregate Backstop Capital is 150 million USDS. The Turbo-Fill Floor is the level below which an accelerated retention rate applies, as specified in [A.2.3.1.2.3 - Step 2: Aggregate Backstop Capital](2b28d464-e683-48ba-9a66-2fee05ea0a88).

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
